nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: Buff-rumped woodpecker
nodes.summary: The buff-rumped woodpecker (Meiglyptes grammithorax) is a species of bird in the family Picidae. It is found in southern Myanmar, Thailand, Malaya, Sumatra and Borneo. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical dry forests and subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests. It was previously considered conspecific with the zebra woodpecker. References External links Image at ADW Archived 2008-10-11 at the Wayback Machine

nodes.name: 婆罗洲
nodes.summary: 婆罗洲是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联91种鸟类，包括菲律宾冢雉、Bornean crestless fireback、红头林鹧鸪等91种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Meiglyptes
